name: bench-recorder
description: Stage 5 / B-4 + B-P4: MCAP recorder bench — a thin harness that drives the PRODUCTION recorder writer (app/orchestrator/recorder). Not part of the npm workspace build — run directly with /opt/homebrew/bin/node. The --import shim (ts-hooks.mjs) lets the bench load the production ESM (path aliases + .js→.ts) under raw node.
